protocol.source_cutoff: returned analysis frame hard-filtered strictly before 2024-01-01
protocol.source_io_disclosure: the shared chunked CSV parser can read and immediately discard rows after the cutoff in its crossing chunk; no such row enters the returned frame, features, thresholds, signals or outcomes
protocol.parent_usage: frozen q95 profile (12,24,6), 144-bar/k2/<=1-opposite campaign; no parent retuning
protocol.mechanism: first same-side terminal absorption after a confirmed campaign, then fade campaign side
protocol.grid: two co-primary policies with wait/hold tied at 6h or 12h; deterministic rank_key selects the reported top and no post-result horizon expansion is allowed

state_machine.scan: campaign confirmed on completed bar i; inspect only completed bars j=i+1..i+h inclusive
state_machine.emission: first threshold hit emits a fade at completed j and enters j+1 open
state_machine.expiry: no hit by i+h expires the campaign
state_machine.pending_precedence: one pending campaign; every new confirmation while pending, including at the inclusive endpoint, is ignored
state_machine.trade_overlap: signal generation continues, but the canonical simulator executes the first candidate and ignores candidates through exit+1

protocol.threshold_semantics: terminal absorption score evaluated under the frozen campaign side, using the frozen parent q95 numeric absorption threshold; it is not a literal later parent-role event
protocol.selection_rule: rank by admission, support, positive full/half windows, positive segment count, minimum and median core ratios, then 2023 trades
protocol.control_rule: all controls reuse identical entry/hold/non-overlap accounting and frozen numeric thresholds; no refits
protocol.entry: completed terminal bar enters next 5m open
protocol.contamination_note: the parent profile/lookback/count came from an outcome-ranked rejected pre-2024 campaign scan; this recombination is contaminated exploratory research, 2023 is inspected internal selection, and 2024+ remained sealed
